title: Shape-to-Picture Challenge
description: A shape composition game where kids place simple shapes on ghost outlines to reveal pictures and faces.
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap shape pieces onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct shapes pop, sparkle, and speak the shape name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished builds speak the surprise picture.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder shape art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
